problem_statement: Manual data capture in the chemical warehouse currently takes 25 minutes per event and consumes significant operator time. The process occurs 6 times per day and creates unnecessary operational effort.
project_objectives: Reduce chemical warehouse capture time from 25 minutes to 5 minutes per event through automation.
project_timing: The project will follow a 3-month DMAIC plan from Define to Control.
in_scope: Automation of the manual capture process in the chemical warehouse for the current operating events.
out_of_scope: Changes unrelated to the chemical warehouse capture process or broader warehouse system transformations.
project_impact_3y: Reducing 20 minutes per event across 6 daily events and 250 operating days can save about 1,000 operator man-hours per year with 2 operators involved. Using the default DIRECT labor reference rate, the preliminary financial impact is 9530 USD per year and 28590 USD over 3 years, pending Finance validation.
